use_cases: Landing page entry point for AI/SaaS products
Marketing homepage hero with interactive card elements
Tech product showcase with branded hero section
ai_summary: A modern landing page hero section designed for AI platforms and SaaS products. Features a dual-column layout with bold typography, descriptive copy, and an interactive dark-themed dashboard card with rotation effects on hover. Includes decorative colorful accent elements (yellow and purple dots/lines) that add visual interest while maintaining a minimalist aesthetic. Fully responsive design with cleaner mobile experience by hiding decorative elements on smaller screens.
